Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Interview: Nobonoko, Master of the Minimal Sequencer 42 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. Pretext: TypeScript library for multiline text measurement and layout 329 upvotes, 61 comments
  3. 15 Years of Forking 213 upvotes, 37 comments
  4. The curious case of retro demo scene graphics 228 upvotes, 47 comments
  5. 15 years, one server, 8GB RAM and 500k users – how Webminal refuses to die 150 upvotes, 30 comments
  6. Douglas Lenat's Automated Mathematician Source Code 36 upvotes, 4 comments
  7. Ninja is a small build system with a focus on speed 34 upvotes, 4 comments
  8. Copilot edited an ad into my PR 766 upvotes, 237 comments
  9. Mathematical methods and human thought in the age of AI 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  10. Voyager 1 runs on 69 KB of memory and an 8-track tape recorder 579 upvotes, 216 comments
  11. Hardware Image Compression 37 upvotes, 8 comments
  12. Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Equation: Reinforcement Learning and Diffusion Models 63 upvotes, 17 comments
  13. Comprehensive C++ Hashmap Benchmarks (2022) 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  14. Philly courts will ban all smart eyeglasses starting next week 291 upvotes, 114 comments
  15. The Cognitive Dark Forest 468 upvotes, 207 comments
  16. How A Spartan Revolutionized Baseball 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  17. The road signs that teach travellers about France 127 upvotes, 54 comments
  18. VHDL's Crown Jewel 82 upvotes, 32 comments
  19. I use excalidraw to manage my diagrams for my blog 112 upvotes, 50 comments
  20. "Roadrunner": a bipedal, wheeled robot for multi-modal locomotion [video] 47 upvotes, 19 comments
  21. ChatGPT won't let you type until Cloudflare reads your React state 736 upvotes, 469 comments
  22. The First Video Game Was Just a Box in the Corner of a Bar 14 upvotes, 4 comments
  23. Midnight train from GA: A view of America from the tracks as airports struggle 113 upvotes, 92 comments
  24. C++26 is done: ISO C++ standards meeting Trip Report 255 upvotes, 237 comments
  25. Coding agents could make free software matter again 213 upvotes, 202 comments
  26. Eclipse GlassFish: This Isn't Your Father's GlassFish 29 upvotes, 24 comments
  27. Ghostmoon.app – The Swiss Army Knife for your macOS menu bar 37 upvotes, 34 comments
